name: copilot-obsidian
description: GitHub Copilot CLI + Obsidian knowledge companion. Persistent compounding wiki vault (Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern). 15 skills: ingest sources, query the vault, lint health, save conversations, autoresearch loops, hybrid retrieval (BM25 + cosine rerank), methodology modes (LYT / PARA / Zettelkasten / Generic), Obsidian canvas, Bases. Forked from AgriciDaniel/claude-obsidian v1.9.2.
